reviews.comment:
Precios en combustibles como en toda la patagónica. Aceptan tarjeta de débito y crédito. Los precios en en la comida son accesibles y para nada exsorbitantes

(Translated by Google)
Fuel prices are the same as throughout Patagonia. Debit and credit cards are accepted. Food prices are affordable and not at all exorbitant.
